title: dactylorhiza elodes
intro: Dactylorhiza elodes, also known as marsh helleborine, is a rare species of orchid native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza elodes include potential uses in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure. Dactylorhiza elodes can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
